_comment: QA-enabled project settings template. Preferred install = `bash ~/.claude/scripts/qa-sdk.sh init` (copies hooks project-local + merges this). Manual fallback: copy the qa-*.js + _qa-common.js + governed-gate-workflow-guard.js hooks into <project>/.claude/hooks/ and merge `hooks` into <project>/.claude/settings.json. Hook paths use ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} (portable; no per-machine HOME edit needed). Hooks gate by .qa/config.json presence — safe to keep enabled in non-QA branches.

PreToolUse._purpose: D1 verdict write-guard: block direct non-SDK writes to .qa/evidence/<tag>/ verdict files (qa_evidence_bundle / gate-result / release-decision). Matcher MUST include MultiEdit (HOOK-BYPASS-MATRIX).

Governed Gate Mode (CLAUDE.md §3.7) + workflow-spec launch gate. governed-gate-workflow-guard blocks inline model-authored Dynamic Workflows / ultracode during an active gate (governed_gate_mode in .qa/config.json: off|active-gate|always, default active-gate); qa-preview-gate validates spec_hash + sentinel + commercial-cert budget for deterministic qa-orchestrator launches.

PostToolUse._purpose: D2 stale-marker: after a QA-relevant source/config/test edit, mark .qa/evidence/<tag>/ STALE if a bundle for the active tag exists (freshness window from .qa/config.json evidence_freshness_hours, default 24h).
D2 stale-marker on deploy commands (same hook, Bash matcher).
